name: fsdecrypt-gui
description: Desktop GUI for extracting fscrypt APP, option, and VHD chain contents.
author: PolarisPyra

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron-ts,electron "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on dist-electron/main.js http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --mac dmg --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --mac dmg --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win: pnpm build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
